special_mechanics.name: Faster Movement

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides game overview and feature descriptions but no precise physics values, frame data, or movement parameters. Fighting game with 8-way joystick controls and standard 3-4 button layout. Character-based movement varies by fighter. No numerical movement or gravity constants documented.
